description_long: This is a compact, vintage-style tractor with a turquoise cab and a wooden flatbed cargo area. The front features a distinctive grille, round headlights, and a decorative white bull horn ornament above a red emblem. The cab is enclosed with large glass windows and side mirrors, while the rear cargo bed is constructed from wooden slats and loaded with cardboard boxes marked with atomic symbols and warning labels. The vehicle has four small wheels, with the rear wheels slightly larger, and the undercarriage includes visible mechanical components. The overall design suggests a utilitarian vehicle, possibly used for light transport or delivery in urban or semi-urban settings.
description: A vintage turquoise tractor with an enclosed cab and a wooden cargo bed loaded with marked boxes, featuring a bull horn ornament and compact wheels.
description_view_0: Front view showing the grille, headlights, bull horn ornament, and red emblem on the hood.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the cab profile, wooden cargo bed, and boxes, with visible undercarriage and side mirrors.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the open wooden cargo bed filled with boxes and the back of the cab.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the cab, wooden cargo bed, and boxes, with the rear wheel and undercarriage visible.
attribute_wheel_configuration: Four wheels, rear wheels slightly larger, likely two-wheel drive
attribute_cabin_design: Enclosed cab with large glass windows, side mirrors, and no visible doors; basic ergonomic features
